title: Short title
doc_html:
§1153.5. Short title

            This Subpart may be cited as the "Louisiana Military Advance Medical Directive Act".

            Acts 1997, No. 1057, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.64 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
